projects.title: Professional Fire Performance Website
projects.description: Full website build for a luxury fire dancing and acrobatics performer. Custom domain, event booking, fire safety documentation, mobile-responsive design with animated fire effects.
projects.result: Professional online presence driving real bookings from Instagram and Facebook

projects.title: EDM Nights Event Landing Page
projects.description: High-conversion event landing page with live countdown timer, Eventbrite checkout widget, social sharing, FAQ, and mobile-first design for a 21+ EDM event at Elite Lounge.
projects.result: Conversion-optimized ticket sales page with embedded checkout — no redirect needed

projects.title: Women's Fitness Coaching Platform
projects.description: Custom fitness coaching website with program delivery, client onboarding, and branded PDF workout generation. Integrated with Stripe for subscription billing.
projects.result: Automated coaching delivery — workouts, nutrition guides, and progress tracking

projects.title: HVAC Company Website
projects.description: Professional website for an air conditioning company serving Southwest Florida. Service pages, emergency contact CTAs, Google Maps integration, and mobile-optimized design.
projects.result: Professional web presence for local HVAC company

projects.title: Shipping & Storage Business Website
projects.description: Business website for a shipping and storage company. Service listings, quote request forms, and location information.
projects.result: Online presence for local shipping business

projects.title: Events / Nightlife Business Website
projects.description: Custom solution delivered for a events / nightlife company in Southwest Florida.
